user.title: Create Relative Light Group
user.description: Create a light group with relative brightness control. Brightness changes are distributed proportionally among lights that are on.

data_description.all: If enabled, the group is considered on only when all members are on. If disabled, the group is on when any member is on.
data_description.remember_on_state: If enabled, when the group is turned off and on again, only the lights that were previously on will turn on.
data_description.remember_brightness: If enabled, the group remembers each light's individual brightness. Ratios are preserved even after hitting brightness limits. Individual brightness can only be changed directly on each light, not from the group.
data_description.debounce_enabled: If enabled, the group ignores state updates from members for a short period after a command is sent, preventing the UI slider from jumping.
data_description.debounce_time: The amount of time in milliseconds to ignore member state updates.
